description_long: This hardware store is a rectangular, single-story commercial building with a flat, gray roof and a modern, minimalist facade. The exterior walls are clad in a wood-textured material, giving it a warm, contemporary appearance. Large, light blue-tinted glass panels dominate the front and side elevations, likely serving as windows or display areas, while smaller white-framed windows are arranged in a grid pattern. A prominent, wide blue door or garage entrance is visible on the front, suggesting access for both customers and deliveries. The base of the building features a muted green band, possibly concrete or stone, adding visual contrast and stability. The overall design is clean and functional, with an emphasis on geometric forms and ample natural light.
description: A modern, rectangular hardware store with wood-textured walls, large blue-tinted glass panels, and a flat gray roof. The facade features a wide blue entrance and a grid of white-framed windows.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a large blue door, several white-framed windows, and extensive wood-textured paneling.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the long, uninterrupted wood-textured wall with minimal window openings and a glimpse of blue glass panels at the far end.
description_view_2: The rear or opposite facade features more blue-tinted glass panels and a similar arrangement of white-framed windows, with the green base visible.
description_view_3: This end view displays a combination of wood-textured panels, a few small white-framed windows, and the green base, with no major entrances visible.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features a wide blue entrance door, large blue-tinted glass panels, and a grid of white-framed windows set within wood-textured walls. The base is accented with a green band, and there are no visible exterior displays or signage.
